title: MBOSE SSLC result 2026 highlights: Meghalaya Board results out, 86.84% students pass; check list of toppers
description: MBOSE SSLC result 2026 highlights: The Meghalaya Board of School Education has declared the MBOSE Class 10 Result 2026. Students can check their results on the official website at mbose.in. Overall, 86.84 per cent of students have cleared the Meghalaya Board SSLC (Class 10) exam 2026.
